TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Su'aci, title = Su'aci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Su'aci} }

S.FORM: Su'aci Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Su'aci a niyaro', 22 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 84 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 74 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun30%, Rukai7%, Cou19%, Hla'alua30%, Amis2%.
S.PHON: so~u~u °a ¶i itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u kao~uńßsio~u~uŇč ko~u so~u~u °a ¶i a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, ro~u~ukai*%, ¶o~uo~u~u**%, ńß…ĺa °a…ĺo~u~ua**%, amis*%.
S.FORM: Su'aci Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Su'aci a niyaro', 22 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 84 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 74 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun30%, Rukai7%, Cou19%, Hla'alua30%, Amis2%.
S.PHON: so~u~u °a ¶i itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u kao~uńßsio~u~uŇč ko~u so~u~u °a ¶i a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, ro~u~ukai*%, ¶o~uo~u~u**%, ńß…ĺa °a…ĺo~u~ua**%, amis*%.
